---
output: html_document
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

McMahon, E., Zheng, C. Y., Pereira, F., Gonzalez, R., Ungerleider, L.G. & Vaziri-Pashkam, M. (2017) Understanding Action Prediction with Machine Learning and Psychophysics. <i>Journal of Vision</i> 19(7): 1-16.
[pdf](files/McMahon2019_JoV.pdf)

Corbetta, D., Wiener, R. F., Thurman, S. L., & McMahon, E. (2017). The Embodied Origins of Infant
Reaching: Implications for the Emergence of Eye-Hand Coordination. <i>Kinesiology Review</i> 7: 10-17.  [pdf](files/Corbetta2017_KinesiologyReview.pdf)
